concept: May I please have a game where time flows normally when I move and nearly stops when I stand still, creating a unique action experience where strategic pauses allow for planning? The world continues in super-slow motion during pauses - bullets crawl through air, falling objects hover, and enemy movements become predictable. Energy depletes while stationary, forcing a balance between planning and action phases. The protagonist gradually learns they are experiencing a neurological phenomenon triggered by extreme stress, giving them brief moments of hyper-cognition during life-threatening situations.
